attributes.headline: You don't need a visa for Colombia if you have a Colombian passport.

informationGroups.name: Visa Requirements
informationGroups.tooltip: Visa requirements are determined by the passport you are travelling with and duration of your trip.
informationGroups.headline: You don't need a visa for Colombia if you have a Colombian passport.

informationGroups.name: Travel Restrictions
informationGroups.tooltip: Travel restrictions often depend on your travel history. Check details for each part of your trip to see if any of them apply to you.

informationGroups.name: Upcoming
informationGroups.tooltip: Some of these changes may not be in effect yet and may change unexpectedly.

attributes.title: Mandatory proof of accommodation
attributes.description:
Travelers must have proof of accommodation during their stay in Colombia. 

If travelers will be hosted by a relative or friend, the host must provide a signed letter of invitation, stating the address and contact phone number. It should include the identification details of both the host and the traveler, and indicate whether the host will cover the traveler’s living expenses. Alternatively, the traveler may attach bank or credit card statements to demonstrate financial solvency.

included.text: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

attributes.title: Recommended pre-registration form before arrival
attributes.description: Travelers are encouraged to complete a pre-registration form (CheckMig) before departure to Colombia. The form can be completed between 72 hours and 1 hour before travel. Completing the form in advance may reduce waiting times at immigration checkpoints.
more:
This requirement doesn’t apply to the following travelers:
-Travelers under the age of 18.

included.text: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

attributes.title: Recommended vaccinations for Colombia
Proof of pre-departure COVID-19 test is not required
attributes.description: Travelers don’t need a COVID-19 test before traveling to Colombia.

included.text: Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
South Georgia and the South Sandwich Islands

attributes.title: No Visa Required
attributes.description: If you have a Colombian passport, you're good to go.

attributes.title: You may need prescription medication for Malaria and Travelers Diarrhea
attributes.description: Check with your doctor or a travel clinic to see if you need any medications for your trip. If you go through our partner, Runway Health, you can initiate an online consultation with a doctor and have your medications delivered to your door. Depending on your location, medications typically arrive within 3-5 business days.
